title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 22: Remove Image Backgrounds with ComfyUI or Photoshop
description:
In Episode 22 of our ComfyUI tutorial series, learn how to easily remove image backgrounds using ComfyUI and Photoshop. This step-by-step guide covers everything from setting up the "InspyreNet" custom node in ComfyUI to refining masks and images in Photoshop for professional results. Whether you're working on portraits, clip art, or game items, this tutorial will help you create high-quality transparent background images efficiently. Perfect for designers, photographers, and content creators looking to optimize their workflows!

Unlock exclusive perks by joining our channel:https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmMbwA-s3GZDKVzGZ-kPwaQ/join

-----
In ComfyUI go to Manger, Custom Nodes Manager and search for inspyrenet
Install 
ComfyUI-Inspyrenet-Rembg
Restart ComfyUI
-----
#comfyui #removebackground
transcript: Welcome to episode 22 of our Comfy UI tutorial series. First, double click on the canvas,  search for a load image node, and add it to the canvas.  Then, click the Choose File button  and upload the image you want to remove the background from.
